Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Electrical to get the job done right.

“Legacy rewired our 1952 Lake Highlands ranch after finding dangerous knob-and-tube wiring behind the walls. They preserved all our original plaster while bringing everything up to code. Two years later, not a single flicker during Texas storms!”

Marcus T. Whole-House Rewiring
Mar 15, 2025

“When the 2023 ice storm hit, our Generac kept our Preston Hollow home warm while neighbors evacuated. The Legacy team installed it perfectly - passes city inspections with flying colors and runs so quietly we forget it's there until we need it.”

Sophia K. Generator Installation
Jan 22, 2025

“As Tesla owners in Frisco, we needed fast home charging. Legacy upgraded our panel and installed two Wall Connectors with perfect placement in our garage. The smart scheduling saves us about $80/month on electricity compared to supercharging.”

Derrick W. EV Charger Installation
Nov 30, 2024

“Our Uptown condo's concrete ceilings made fan installation tricky, but Legacy's special mounts worked perfectly. The DC motor fan is whisper-quiet and keeps our bedroom comfortable without cranking the AC all summer.”

Lisa M. Ceiling Fan Installation
Sep 18, 2024

“After lightning fried our home theater system last spring, Legacy installed whole-house surge protection. When another storm hit this June, our system handled multiple direct strikes with zero damage. Worth every penny for Dallas homeowners.”

Carlos R. Surge Protection Installation
Aug 5, 2024

“Legacy transformed our dark Bishop Arts backyard into an evening oasis. The path lighting withstands Texas storms, and the motion lights give peace of mind. They even matched the sconces to our historic home's style.”

Natalie B. Outdoor Lighting Installation
Jun 12, 2024
Legacy Electrical

Trusted electrical professionals serving Dallas, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
